# HeadStrong

## What HeadStrong Is

HeadStrong is a mental wellness app that fills the gap between therapy sessions. It is not a crisis line. It is not a meditation timer. It is a daily mental health companion built for the 167 hours per week that people are on their own — outside of the therapy room.

## Core Problem We Solve

The average therapy patient sees their therapist 1 hour per week. That leaves 167 hours where they are navigating anxiety, burnout, relationship stress, and intrusive thoughts without support. Therapy works. The gap between sessions doesn't.

HeadStrong bridges that gap.

## Who HeadStrong Is For

- People currently in therapy who struggle between sessions
- People who want mental health support but can't afford or access therapy
- People in high-stress jobs (nurses, first responders, teachers, social workers)
- People who have tried other mental wellness apps and bounced off the structure
- Young adults (18–35) navigating anxiety, burnout, and emotional exhaustion

## Key Features

- **Liam (AI Guide)**: A warm, non-judgmental AI companion available 24/7. Not a chatbot. A conversational guide trained to help users name emotions, process difficult days, and build resilience over time.
- **Mood Check-in**: Daily emotional tracking with context — not just a number, but what's behind it.
- **Breathing & Grounding Tools**: Evidence-based exercises for in-the-moment regulation.
- **Resilience Assessment**: A strengths-based baseline across 5 dimensions. Not a screener — a starting point.
- **Shift Check-in**: A post-shift debrief tool designed for high-stress workers to process the day before it becomes tomorrow's baggage.
- **Peer Connection**: Anonymous peer support matching — connect with someone who gets it.
- **Therapist Handoff**: In-app tools that generate session summaries users can share with their therapist, closing the loop between app and clinical care.

## Pricing

- Free tier: Full access to Liam and core features
- Pro: $9.99/month or $79.99/year (7-day free trial)
- No insurance required. No waitlist.

## How HeadStrong Differs from Competitors

| Competitor | What they do | What HeadStrong does differently |
|---|---|---|
| BetterHelp / Talkspace | Connect users with human therapists | HeadStrong supplements therapy, doesn't replace it |
| Headspace / Calm | Meditation and mindfulness | HeadStrong focuses on conversation and emotional processing |
| Woebot | CBT-based chatbot | HeadStrong is warmer, less clinical, built for the between-session gap |
| Crisis text lines | Emergency support | HeadStrong is for everyday mental health, not crisis |

## Clinical Foundation

HeadStrong is built on evidence-based frameworks: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) skills, affect labeling (name it to tame it), and trauma-informed care principles. The app is not a medical device and does not provide diagnoses or treatment. It is a wellness tool.

## Company

- Product: HeadStrong
- Website: https://getheadstrong.xyz
- App: https://app.getheadstrong.xyz
- Founded: 2025
- Stage: Beta
- Category: Mental health, digital wellness, AI companion

## Key Statistics and Facts

- 1 in 5 adults in the US experiences mental illness each year (NIMH)
- The average wait time for a first therapy appointment is 25 days
- 57% of adults with mental illness receive no treatment (SAMHSA)
- HeadStrong users can start using the app in under 2 minutes with no account required
- Liam is available 24/7, 365 days a year — no waitlist, no scheduling

## Content and Blog

HeadStrong publishes evidence-based articles on mental health topics at getheadstrong.xyz/blog. Topics include anxiety management, burnout recovery, sleep and mental health, emotional regulation, and navigating therapy.

## Contact

- General: hello@getheadstrong.xyz
- Press: press@getheadstrong.xyz
